operationName: Operation Swords of Iron (Israel) / October 7 War
heroHeadline: Gaza War: 875 Days — 61,700+ Killed, All Hostages Returned, Ceasefire Violations Continue
heroSubtitle: From Hamas's October 7 attack through two ceasefire deals: 251 hostages eventually accounted for, Gaza faces famine and reconstruction costing $40–80B, ICJ genocide case ongoing
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Hamas, UN OCHA, UNRWA, WHO, ICJ, ICC, Al Jazeera War Tracker, Times of Israel, and Haaretz. Gaza death toll: 61,709 confirmed + 14,222 missing = ~76,000 total (Al Jazeera / OCHA, Apr 2025).
